tool.name: Arthur GenAI Engine
tool.description: Agent governance and discovery platform following Arthur AI's January 2026 GenAI Engine rename.
tool.statusNote: Rebranded from Arthur AI to Arthur GenAI Engine and pivoted toward agent discovery and governance.
tool.logoNotes: Official Arthur homepage logo asset captured from the owner-controlled site after the January 2026 GenAI Engine rebrand (`arthur-logo-dark.avif` via the Arthur Webflow CDN).
tool.practitionerNote: Better suited to enterprises that want governance tied to observability, evaluation, and runtime risk monitoring rather than isolated content filters alone.

dataResidency.detail: SaaS, on-prem, and direct-GCP/AWS deploy options; SaaS residency regions not documented.

deployment.detail: Deploy via SaaS, on-prem, or directly on GCP/AWS.

auditLogging.detail: No specific audit-logging documentation surfaced; observability-oriented platform.

soc2.detail: No SOC 2 claim found on public Arthur pages.

iso27001.detail: No ISO 27001 claim found on public Arthur pages.

euAiAct.detail: Agent governance/observability component; helps operators manage their own AI compliance.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary product (contact pricing); venture-backed startup risk.
